title: Project Officer (Chemical Biology)
description:
School of Chemistry, Chemical Engineering & Biotechnology, NTU is a pioneering interdisciplinary school to create deeper synergies between fundamental science and engineering for impactful research and innovation. The key objective is to support efforts to advance interdisciplinary education and research excellence, and to accelerate innovation across biotechnology & synthetic biology, food science & technology, and translational healthcare and biomedical technology, aligned with the University’s broader research and innovation mission.

We are looking for a Project Officer to provide critical research support for the development of carry-free peptide PROTAC assemblies by executing experimental workflows, including molecular synthesis, cellular assays, and in vivo validation. Meanwhile, the role will focus on translating scientific outcomes into high-impact deliverables such as peer-reviewed manuscripts and patent applications.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Molecular synthesis, purification, and characterization.
  • Carry-free peptide PROTAC assembly and formulation optimization.
  • Cell-based assays validating drug efficacy and mechanism.
  • In vivo validation studies and sample analyses.
  • Ensure compliance with chemical, biosafety, and animal ethics.
  • Prepare figures, methods, and manuscript drafts for publication.
  • Support invention disclosures and patent drafting documentation.
  • Coordinate with core facilities, collaborators, and vendors.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's qualification degree in chemistry, material science or related field.
  • At least 4 years of relevant technical hands-on experience in chemical biology.
  • Familiarity with target protein degradation, peptide chemistry, and nano-delivery system.
  • Good written and oral communication skills.
  • Proficiency in organic molecule synthesis, cellular analysis and in vivo (mice) experiments.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
A research-intensive public university, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore (NTU Singapore) has 33,000 undergraduate and postgraduate students in the Engineering, Business, Science, Humanities, Arts, & Social Sciences, and Graduate colleges. It also has a medical school, the Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine, established jointly with Imperial College London.


NTU is also home to world-class autonomous institutes – the National Institute of Education, S Rajaratnam School of International Studies, Earth Observatory of Singapore, and Singapore Centre for Environmental Life Sciences Engineering – and various leading research centres such as the Nanyang Environment & Water Research Institute (NEWRI) and Energy Research Institute @ NTU (ERI@N).


Ranked amongst the world’s top universities by QS, NTU has also been named the world’s top young university for the past seven years. The University’s main campus is frequently listed among the Top 15 most beautiful university campuses in the world and has 57 Green Mark-certified (equivalent to LEED-certified) buildings, of which 95% are certified Green Mark Platinum. Apart from its main campus, NTU also has a campus in Novena, Singapore’s healthcare district.


Under the NTU Smart Campus vision, the University harnesses the power of digital technology and tech-enabled solutions to support better learning and living experiences, the discovery of new knowledge, and the sustainability of resources.


For more information, visit www.ntu.edu.sg
postedCompany.name: NANYANG TECHNOLOGICAL UNIVERSITY
